title: Fresh Fluffy Borlotti Beans Stir-fry
description: A fresh and fluffy Ukrainian dish featuring borlotti beans, perfect for a romantic date night. This pescatarian-friendly meal is slow-cooked to perfection.
instructions: Rinse and soak the borlotti beans in water overnight.
Soak onions in cold water for 15 minutes. Peel them after soaking.
Drain and rinse the soaked beans, set aside. Drain and chop onions into fine strips.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until they become translucent.
Add garlic cloves and stir for about 30 seconds, being careful not to burn them.
Stir in the drained beans and cook for about 5 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Drizzle soy sauce evenly over the mixture. Add salt and pepper to taste. Stir well.
Toss in fresh herbs for a final garnish if desired.
